creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
* Update x11-toolkits/{py-wxPython28, py-wxPython28-common,py-wxPython28-unicode} to 2.8.10.1. A patch from Fedora is used to backport the code to 2.8.10.
Original patch at http://lists.fedoraproject.org/pipermail/scm-commits/2010-January/381132.html
* Keep pkg-plist sorted

For x11-toolkits/py-wxPython28:
* Reset PORTREVISION where appropriate
* Add USE_GETTEXT=yes
* Instead of using a != assignment to determine the wx-version (2.8), use the value of USE_WX

Fix: 

Patches can be found at 
ftp://rene-ladan.nl/pub/freebsdq/py-wxPython28.diff
SIZE=96306
SHA256=2bda7e02ba607e8e8571dd9ea7af735846f258008f1d7bc34649826575123e56
ftp://rene-ladan.nl/pub/freebsd/py-wxPython28-common.diff
SIZE=25236
SHA256=1c3860aa0f8fda17f9404b95a74c77ad91b8f7c9cf1e12da28187dfffa24367d

The unicode version of the port did not change.
